name: superduperpowers
description: Local-first skills and agents for deliberate coding workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Planning, TDD, debugging, and delivery workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use SuperDuperPowers to guide agent work through brainstorming, implementation planning, test-driven development, systematic debugging, parallel execution, code review, and finish-the-branch workflows.
defaultPrompt: I've got an idea for something I'd like to build.
Let's add a feature to this project.
